question: What feature of the backyard stands out the most? Select from the following options: (A) The patio area beneath the pergola.. (B) The small trees surrounding the brick pathway.. (C) The wooden fence bordering the garden.. (D) The brick sidewalk leading to the pergola..
gold_answer: The brick sidewalk leading to the pergola
answer_choices: The patio area beneath the pergola
